title: Toast Input Layout (.tlayout)
description: Maps input actions to layers, controlling which actions are active in each gameplay context

layers.description: Named layers. The hidden 'default' layer is implicit and always present

action.description: Action references owned by this layout

id.description: UID of the referenced input_action asset

included.description: Whitelist of layers this action is active in

excluded.description: Blacklist of layers. An excluded layer always disables the action
